title: Coding Agents
description: Coding-agent observability across vendors (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Copilot CLI). Sessions, cost, tools, users, classification, and governance — sourced live from otel_traces emitted by the openlit CLI hook.

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111111.title: Total sessions
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111111.description: Distinct coding-agent sessions in the selected window. Optionally vendor- and user-scoped to match what the agents-hub card and the Sessions / Users tabs show.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    (end_time - start_time) AS duration,
    (start_time - duration) AS prev_start_time,
    (end_time - duration) AS prev_end_time,
    per_session_now AS (
        SELECT
            coalesce(
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.agent.parent_id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.agent.parent_id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], '')
            ) AS chat_id,
            coalesce( nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''), 'unknown' ) AS vendor,
            coalesce(
                nullIf(any(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['service.name']), ''),
                'unknown'
            ) AS user
        FROM otel_traces
        WHERE (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
          AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
        GROUP BY chat_id, vendor
    ),
    per_session_prev AS (
        SELECT
            coalesce(
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.agent.parent_id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.agent.parent_id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], '')
            ) AS chat_id,
            coalesce( nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''), 'unknown' ) AS vendor,
            coalesce(
                nullIf(any(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['service.name']), ''),
                'unknown'
            ) AS user
        FROM otel_traces
        WHERE (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
          AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
        GROUP BY chat_id, vendor
    ),
    totals AS (
        SELECT
            (SELECT toInt64(count()) FROM per_session_now WHERE 1=1{{#filter.vendor}} AND vendor = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}{{#filter.user}} AND user = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}) AS now_total,
            (SELECT toInt64(count()) FROM per_session_prev WHERE 1=1{{#filter.vendor}} AND vendor = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}{{#filter.user}} AND user = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}) AS prev_total
    )

SELECT
    CAST(now_total AS INTEGER) AS total_sessions,
    CAST(prev_total AS INTEGER) AS total_sessions_previous,
    if(prev_total > 0, round((now_total - prev_total) * 100.0 / prev_total, 1), NULL) AS rate
FROM totals

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111112.title: Active users
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111112.description: Distinct users in the selected window, optionally vendor-scoped (gen_ai.user.name → service.name).

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    (end_time - start_time) AS duration,
    (start_time - duration) AS prev_start_time,
    (end_time - duration) AS prev_end_time,
    per_session_now AS (
        SELECT
            coalesce(
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['session.id'], '')
            ) AS sid,
            coalesce( nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''), 'unknown' ) AS vendor,
            coalesce(
                nullIf(any(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['service.name']), ''),
                'unknown'
            ) AS user
        FROM otel_traces
        WHERE (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
          AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
        GROUP BY sid, vendor
    ),
    per_session_prev AS (
        SELECT
            coalesce(
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['session.id'], '')
            ) AS sid,
            coalesce( nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''), 'unknown' ) AS vendor,
            coalesce(
                nullIf(any(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['service.name']), ''),
                'unknown'
            ) AS user
        FROM otel_traces
        WHERE (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
          AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
        GROUP BY sid, vendor
    ),
    totals AS (
        SELECT
            (SELECT uniqExact(user) FROM per_session_now WHERE 1=1{{#filter.vendor}} AND vendor = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}{{#filter.user}} AND user = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}) AS now_total,
            (SELECT uniqExact(user) FROM per_session_prev WHERE 1=1{{#filter.vendor}} AND vendor = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}{{#filter.user}} AND user = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}) AS prev_total
    )

SELECT
    CAST(now_total AS INTEGER) AS active_users,
    if(prev_total > 0, round((now_total - prev_total) * 100.0 / prev_total, 1), NULL) AS rate
FROM totals

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111113.title: Total cost (USD)
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111113.description: Per-session cost rolled up: greatest of the authoritative coding_agent.session.cost_usd and the sum of per-turn gen_ai.usage.cost. Matches the Sessions list, the Users tab, and the agents-hub Coding Agents card.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    (end_time - start_time) AS duration,
    (start_time - duration) AS prev_start_time,
    (end_time - duration) AS prev_end_time,
    -- Canonical per-session cost. Same formula listSessions /
    -- listCodingUsers / the agents-hub materializer use. Without
    -- the greatest() this widget silently under-counts: sessions
    -- whose only cost signal is the session-end stamp
    -- (coding_agent.session.cost_usd, set on Stop / SessionEnd by
    -- Claude Code and Codex) would report $0 because no per-turn
    -- gen_ai.usage.cost was ever emitted.
    cost_now AS (
        SELECT
            coalesce(
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.agent.parent_id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.agent.parent_id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], '')
            ) AS chat_id,
            coalesce( nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''), 'unknown' ) AS vendor,
            coalesce(
                nullIf(any(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['service.name']), ''),
                'unknown'
            ) AS user,
            greatest(
                toFloat64OrZero(any(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.cost_usd'])),
                sumOrNull(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.usage.cost']))
            ) AS session_cost
        FROM otel_traces
        WHERE (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
          AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
        GROUP BY chat_id, vendor
    ),
    cost_prev AS (
        SELECT
            coalesce(
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.agent.parent_id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.agent.parent_id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], '')
            ) AS chat_id,
            coalesce( nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''), 'unknown' ) AS vendor,
            coalesce(
                nullIf(any(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['service.name']), ''),
                'unknown'
            ) AS user,
            greatest(
                toFloat64OrZero(any(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.cost_usd'])),
                sumOrNull(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.usage.cost']))
            ) AS session_cost
        FROM otel_traces
        WHERE (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
          AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
        GROUP BY chat_id, vendor
    ),
    totals AS (
        SELECT
            (SELECT round(sumOrNull(session_cost), 4) FROM cost_now WHERE 1=1{{#filter.vendor}} AND vendor = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}{{#filter.user}} AND user = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}) AS now_total,
            (SELECT round(sumOrNull(session_cost), 4) FROM cost_prev WHERE 1=1{{#filter.vendor}} AND vendor = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}{{#filter.user}} AND user = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}) AS prev_total
    )

SELECT
    coalesce(now_total, 0) AS total_cost,
    coalesce(prev_total, 0) AS total_cost_previous,
    if(coalesce(prev_total, 0) > 0, round((coalesce(now_total, 0) - coalesce(prev_total, 0)) * 100.0 / coalesce(prev_total, 0), 1), NULL) AS rate
FROM totals

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111114.title: Total tool calls
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111114.description: Distinct tool invocations across the selected window, optionally vendor- and user-scoped.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    (end_time - start_time) AS duration,
    (start_time - duration) AS prev_start_time,
    (end_time - duration) AS prev_end_time

SELECT
    CAST(countIf(
        SpanName IN ('coding_agent.tool.call', 'claude_code.tool')
        AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
        {{#filter.vendor}}AND coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], '')) = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}
        {{#filter.user}}AND coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}
    ) AS INTEGER) AS total_tools,

    CAST(countIf(
        SpanName IN ('coding_agent.tool.call', 'claude_code.tool')
        AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
        {{#filter.vendor}}AND coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], '')) = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}
        {{#filter.user}}AND coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}
    ) AS INTEGER) AS total_tools_previous,

    if(total_tools_previous > 0, round((total_tools - total_tools_previous) * 100.0 / total_tools_previous, 1), NULL) AS rate
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName IN ('coding_agent.tool.call', 'claude_code.tool')
    AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa22222221.title: Sessions over time
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa22222221.description: Distinct coding-agent sessions bucketed across the window. Optionally vendor- and user-scoped.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    dateDiff('day', start_time, end_time) AS days_diff,
    dateDiff('year', start_time, end_time) AS years_diff,
    multiIf(
        years_diff >= 1, 'month',
        days_diff <= 1, 'hour',
        'day'
    ) AS date_granularity

SELECT
    CAST(uniq(coalesce(
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['session.id'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['session.id'], '')
    )) AS INTEGER) AS sessions,
    formatDateTime(DATE_TRUNC(date_granularity, Timestamp), '%Y/%m/%d %R') AS request_time
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
    {{#filter.vendor}}AND coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], '')) = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}
    {{#filter.user}}AND coalesce(
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''),
        'unknown'
    ) = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}
GROUP BY request_time
ORDER BY request_time

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa22222222.title: Sessions by vendor
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa22222222.description: Sessions broken down by coding-agent vendor. Honours filter.vendor: scoped to the active vendor on per-vendor detail pages, cross-vendor on the per-user page.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    per_session AS (
        SELECT
            coalesce(
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['session.id'], '')
            ) AS sid,
            coalesce( nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''), 'unknown' ) AS vendor,
            coalesce(
                nullIf(any(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['service.name']), ''),
                'unknown'
            ) AS user
        FROM otel_traces
        WHERE (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
          AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
        GROUP BY sid, vendor
    )

SELECT vendor, CAST(count() AS INTEGER) AS sessions
FROM per_session
WHERE 1=1{{#filter.vendor}}
  AND vendor = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}{{#filter.user}}
  AND user = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}
GROUP BY vendor
ORDER BY sessions DESC

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa33333331.title: Top tools
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa33333331.description: Top tools invoked across coding-agent sessions, optionally vendor- and user-scoped.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    coalesce(
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.tool.name'], ''),
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.tool.name'], ''),
        'unknown'
    ) AS tool,
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS calls
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName IN ('coding_agent.tool.call', 'coding_agent.tool.requested')
    AND (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
    {{#filter.vendor}}AND coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], '')) = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}
    {{#filter.user}}AND coalesce(
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''),
        'unknown'
    ) = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}
GROUP BY tool
ORDER BY calls DESC
LIMIT 10

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa33333332.title: Top users
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa33333332.description: Top users by session count, optionally vendor-scoped (gen_ai.user.name → service.name).

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    per_session AS (
        SELECT
            coalesce(
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['session.id'], '')
            ) AS sid,
            coalesce( nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''), 'unknown' ) AS vendor,
            coalesce(
                nullIf(any(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['service.name']), ''),
                'unknown'
            ) AS user
        FROM otel_traces
        WHERE (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
          AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
        GROUP BY sid, vendor
    )

SELECT user, CAST(count() AS INTEGER) AS sessions
FROM per_session
WHERE 1=1{{#filter.vendor}} AND vendor = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}
GROUP BY user
ORDER BY sessions DESC
LIMIT 10

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa33333333.title: Top repositories
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa33333333.description: Repositories where coding-agent sessions ran (vcs.repository.url.full), optionally vendor- and user-scoped.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    SpanAttributes['vcs.repository.url.full'] AS repo,
    CAST(uniq(coalesce(
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['session.id'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['session.id'], '')
    )) AS INTEGER) AS sessions
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    notEmpty(SpanAttributes['vcs.repository.url.full'])
    AND (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
    {{#filter.vendor}}AND coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], '')) = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}
    {{#filter.user}}AND coalesce(
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''),
        'unknown'
    ) = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}
GROUP BY repo
ORDER BY sessions DESC
LIMIT 10

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa44444441.title: Personal vs work classification
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa44444441.description: Sessions broken down by coding_agent.user.classification (personal | work | disputed | unknown), optionally vendor-scoped.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    per_session AS (
        SELECT
            coalesce(
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['session.id'], '')
            ) AS sid,
            coalesce( nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''), 'unknown' ) AS vendor,
            coalesce(
                nullIf(any(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.user.classification']), ''),
                'unknown'
            ) AS classification,
            coalesce(
                nullIf(any(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['service.name']), ''),
                'unknown'
            ) AS user
        FROM otel_traces
        WHERE (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
          AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
        GROUP BY sid, vendor
    )

SELECT classification, CAST(count() AS INTEGER) AS sessions
FROM per_session
WHERE 1=1{{#filter.vendor}} AND vendor = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}{{#filter.user}}
  AND user = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}
GROUP BY classification
ORDER BY sessions DESC

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa44444442.title: Top models
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa44444442.description: Top LLM models behind coding-agent activity, optionally vendor- and user-scoped.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] AS model,
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS calls
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'])
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
    {{#filter.vendor}}AND coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], '')) = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}
    {{#filter.user}}AND coalesce(
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''),
        'unknown'
    ) = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY calls DESC
LIMIT 10

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa55555551.title: Session outcomes
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa55555551.description: Distribution of session outcomes — merged, committed, abandoned, cancelled — optionally vendor-scoped.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    per_session AS (
        SELECT
            coalesce(
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(SpanAttributes['session.id'], ''),
                nullIf(ResourceAttributes['session.id'], '')
            ) AS sid,
            coalesce( nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''), 'unknown' ) AS vendor,
            coalesce(nullIf(any(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.outcome']), ''), 'unknown') AS outcome,
            coalesce(
                nullIf(any(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']), ''),
                nullIf(any(ResourceAttributes['service.name']), ''),
                'unknown'
            ) AS user
        FROM otel_traces
        WHERE (
            notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
            OR (ResourceAttributes['service.name'] = 'claude-code'
                AND (notEmpty(SpanAttributes['session.id']) OR notEmpty(ResourceAttributes['session.id'])))
        )
          AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
        GROUP BY sid, vendor
    )

SELECT outcome, CAST(count() AS INTEGER) AS sessions
FROM per_session
WHERE 1=1{{#filter.vendor}} AND vendor = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}{{#filter.user}}
  AND user = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}
GROUP BY outcome
ORDER BY sessions DESC

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa55555552.title: Edit decisions
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa55555552.description: Auto-applied vs user-reviewed edits — gauge user trust in the agent. Optionally vendor- and user-scoped.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.edit.decision'], ''), 'unknown') AS decision,
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS edits
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'coding_agent.edit.decision'
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
    {{#filter.vendor}}AND coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], '')) = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}
    {{#filter.user}}AND coalesce(
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''),
        'unknown'
    ) = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}
GROUP BY decision
ORDER BY edits DESC

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa55555553.title: MCP servers in use
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa55555553.description: Top MCP servers attached to coding-agent runs (governance signal). Optionally vendor- and user-scoped.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    SpanAttributes['coding_agent.mcp.server.name'] AS server,
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS invocations
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.mcp.server.name'])
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
    {{#filter.vendor}}AND coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'], ''), nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], '')) = '{{filter.vendor}}'{{/filter.vendor}}
    {{#filter.user}}AND coalesce(
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'], ''),
        nullIf(ResourceAttributes['service.name'], ''),
        'unknown'
    ) = '{{filter.user}}'{{/filter.user}}
GROUP BY server
ORDER BY invocations DESC
LIMIT 10
